## Payments — what's actually closing

**Last 24h: 4 payments / $946**

| Time (UTC)             | Tier      | Amount  | Email                      |
|------------------------|-----------|---------|----------------------------|
| 2026-05-07 11:54       | Partnered | $499    | Sheila@couplify.com        |
| 2026-05-07 06:38       | Awakened  | $149    | hss@dacapo.com             |
| 2026-05-07 06:37       | Awakened  | $149    | hss@dacapo.com             |
| 2026-05-07 06:36       | Awakened  | $149    | hss@dacapo.com             |

⚠ **Anomaly**: `hss@dacapo.com` submitted Awakened ($149) **3 times in 2 minutes**. Looks like duplicate captures, payment retry, or PayPal idempotency leak. Worth confirming with PayPal that only one capture actually completed before treating it as 3× revenue.

**Tier mix (lifetime real payments, n=51)**:
- Awakened ($149): **40** (78%)
- Partnered ($499): **6** (12%)
- Unified ($999): **5** (10%)

**Unique paying customers (lifetime)**: **18** (51 payments / 18 customers ≈ 2.8 payments per customer — suggests recurring/multi-tier behavior or duplicates).

## Conversations — top-of-funnel pulse

- **24h**: 92 sessions, 496 messages → ~5.4 messages/session
- **7d**: 712 sessions, 2,264 messages → ~3.2 messages/session
- **Lifetime**: 2,954 unique sessions, 16,652 messages

**Conversion estimate (very rough)**:
- 30d: 8 paid / 1,749 sessions = **0.46% session→pay conversion**
- 7d:  6 paid / 712 sessions = **0.84%**
- This is sessions, not visitors. Real CR likely lower (multi-session shoppers) or higher (returning paid customers reduce the denominator).

## ⚠ Data-pipeline issues (worth a routing flag)

Three local mirrors look stale. Either the BOOP/log-server stopped writing or the data is now living only in CF Workers / D1 / R2 (which is the constitutional pattern — `feedback_nothing_in_containers_ever.md`):

1. **`onboarding-session.jsonl`** — 0 events in 7d, last write was Jan/Feb era (43 lifetime). Onboarding is constitutionally locked and live, so events ARE happening — the local mirror is just blind to them.
2. **`purebrain_emails.jsonl`** — 0 captures in 7d (37 lifetime). Either lead-capture is mirrored to D1 only, or seed-form captures stopped logging here.
3. **`birth_completions.jsonl`** — 10 entries total, only 4 "real", all dated 2026-03-04. Birth pipeline has been LIVE since 2026-03-14 (per memory) but no completions logged here since.

**`payment_webhook_delivery.jsonl`** has 2 entries, both `prodigy-growth-dashboard` skipped because subscriber disabled. Webhook fan-out is effectively a no-op — the CF Worker is the system of record.

**Assessment completions** (AI Readiness, AI Tool Stack Calculator, Cost Comparison): **no local log file exists** for these. Data lives in the CF Worker / D1. To track completions, this BOOP needs read access to the relevant D1 tables (or the Worker needs to mirror to a local jsonl).

## Recommended next routes (don't action — flag only)

- **ST# / data-engineer**: Wire a nightly D1 → local jsonl mirror for `assessments`, `email_captures`, `birth_completions`, `onboarding_progress`. Then this BOOP can report real assessment completion counts. Local logs are fine as a read-only mirror, not as a system-of-record (constitutional: D1 stays SoR).
- **AF# / payment-flow-qa**: Investigate `hss@dacapo.com` — 3 Awakened captures in 2 min. Confirm in PayPal whether this is 3 charges or 1, refund/dedupe if needed.
- **MA# / marketing-strategist**: 712 sessions/week → 6 paid is a real top-of-funnel pulse. Worth an attribution pass on which entry pages / referral codes those 6 came from. Conversion is ~0.84% — Awakened-tier dominance (78%) suggests pricing-page is steering toward $149 vs Partnered/Unified.
- **the-conductor**: Day-3 default eligible — flag stale local mirrors as a recurring infra ticket if not resolved within 3 days.
